about.heroDesc: METALR designs, manufactures and installs custom steel structures for agriculture, solar energy, industrial and civil engineering sectors. 8 production plants, +1,000 projects delivered.
about.heroDescPart2: the metal industry with sustainable and innovative solutions
about.valuesSubtitle: Principles that guide each of our actions for exceptional results
about.v1Desc: Cutting-edge innovation and expertise in every metal project
about.v2Desc: ISO 9001 and EN 1090 standards for absolute guarantee
about.v3Desc: Eco-responsible solutions for a green energy future
about.v4Desc: Commitment and support throughout the entire lifecycle
about.timelineSubtitle: 7 years of continuous innovation and expansion across the world
about.t1Desc: Launch of activities in France with a clear vision
about.t2Desc: Opening of the high-tech production site in Beauvais
about.t3Desc: Strategic establishment in Kosovo and South-Eastern Europe
about.t4Desc: Exponential growth of the client portfolio
about.t5Desc: Openings in Tunisia and Guinea, continental development
about.t6Desc: Achievement of ISO 9001, 14001, 45001 and EN 1090, recognized excellence
about.teamSubtitle: Recognized expertise at the service of your success
about.ctaDesc: Join the hundreds of companies that trust us for their metal and photovoltaic projects
about.foundersDesc: With strong expertise in steel construction, Mickaël and Charlotte Rochefort founded METALR in 2018 with a clear ambition: delivering custom-made, industrial-grade steel structures for the agricultural, photovoltaic and civil engineering sectors. From France, they built a company with 8 production plants and over 1,000 projects delivered.
about.mission1: Build strong buildings, designed to last and adapt to your business
about.mission2: Stand by your side from the first sketch to handing over the keys
about.mission3: Keep our promises: deadlines, quality, budget, no surprises
about.mission4: Play a real part in the energy transition, one project at a time
about.value1: Quality craftsmanship. We don't deliver anything we wouldn't be proud of.
about.value2: Human relationships. A real person, not a case number.
about.value3: Smart innovation. Always looking for the most intelligent solution.
about.value4: Keeping our word. When we commit, we deliver.

photovoltaique.heroSubtitle: Parking canopies, ground-mounted plants, PV roofs and solar trackers. Design, manufacturing and turnkey installation.
photovoltaique.pt1Desc: Solar parking for local authorities and businesses
photovoltaique.pt3Desc: Equipment for industrial and commercial buildings
photovoltaique.pt4Desc: Adjustable structures that follow the sun to maximize output
photovoltaique.processTitle: From feasibility study to commissioning of your solar installation
photovoltaique.proc1Desc: Technical and financial analysis of your project
photovoltaique.proc3Desc: Production of structures in our factories
photovoltaique.certsSubtitle: Every METALR photovoltaic structure is designed, manufactured and installed in compliance with the most demanding standards.
photovoltaique.cert1Desc: All our structures comply with European directives and are calculated according to Eurocodes EN 1993 and EN 1991. Declarations of performance (DoP) provided for each structure.
photovoltaique.cert2Desc: Certified quality management system and execution class EXC2/EXC3 depending on structures. Full traceability of every piece, from the rolling mill to the site.
photovoltaique.cert3Desc: Decennial warranty on structural works and 25-year energy performance guarantee. Our structures are designed to withstand the most severe climatic loads.
photovoltaique.cert4Desc: Dimensional checks, weld testing and assembly verification at every manufacturing stage. Control report provided upon delivery.
photovoltaique.advantagesTitle: Why choose METALR for your solar project
photovoltaique.advantagesSubtitle: Unique industrial expertise that guarantees the performance and durability of your photovoltaic installations.
photovoltaique.adv1Desc: Our engineers size each structure according to local climatic loads, ground constraints and panel specifications. 3D modeling and execution plans included.
photovoltaique.adv2Desc: 8 factories in Europe and Africa with CNC laser cutting, robotic bending and hot-dip galvanization. Full control of the chain, from raw material to finished product.
photovoltaique.adv3Desc: Qualified assembly teams operating throughout France and internationally. Electrical connection, commissioning and operator training.
photovoltaique.adv4Desc: Detailed planning from order. 98% of our projects are delivered on time. Real-time tracking of your site progress.
photovoltaique.adv5Desc: Building permits, prior declarations, grid connection, purchase agreements: we handle all procedures for you.
photovoltaique.adv6Desc: Remote production monitoring, preventive and corrective interventions. Custom maintenance contracts to optimize yield over the entire lifespan.
photovoltaique.ctaDesc: Our experts support you through your energy transition
photovoltaique.miniFaq1Q: What is the lifespan of a METALR photovoltaic canopy?
photovoltaique.miniFaq1A: Our steel structures are guaranteed for 25 years and designed to last over 30 years. Hot-dip galvanization protects the steel from corrosion. Solar panels retain over 80% of their output after 25 years.
photovoltaique.miniFaq2Q: Does METALR handle the administrative procedures for a solar project?
photovoltaique.miniFaq2A: Yes, we take care of all the procedures: building permits, prior declarations, ENEDIS grid connection, EDF OA purchase agreements, thermal studies and coordination with inspection bodies.
photovoltaique.miniFaq3Q: What is the return on investment for a solar canopy?
photovoltaique.miniFaq3A: The return on investment is generally between 7 and 12 years depending on installed capacity, solar irradiance and feed-in tariff. Our teams carry out a personalized profitability study from the feasibility phase.

solutions.subtitle: Innovative and sustainable metal structures for agriculture, solar energy, industry and civil engineering

solutions.s2Desc: Solar carports, ground-mounted plants and turnkey photovoltaic roofing

solutions.adv4: Complete control of the value chain
solutions.adv5: Delivery deadline compliance and quality commitment
solutions.adv6: Dedicated technical support and after-sales service
solutions.ctaDesc: Our experts are at your disposal to study your project and propose a solution tailored to your needs

agricole.heroSubtitle: Free-stall barns, storage sheds and AgriPV structures designed for modern farming operations.
agricole.buildingsTitle: Free-stall barns, storage sheds and livestock buildings
agricole.b1Desc: Stabling, poultry houses and structures for all types of livestock
agricole.b2Desc: Storage sheds for grain, equipment and fodder
agricole.b3Desc: Modular buildings adapted to your farm's needs
agricole.agripvTitle: AgriPV: photovoltaic structures for farming operations
agricole.agripvDesc: Combine agricultural production and solar income with canopies and PV roofs sized for your livestock and storage buildings.
agricole.ben1: Robust and durable structures designed to withstand agricultural conditions
agricole.ben2: Optimal ventilation for animal welfare and conservation
agricole.ben3: Custom design adapted to your farm
agricole.ben4: Compliance with environmental and sanitary standards
agricole.ben5: Fast installation with minimum disruption to your activities
agricole.ben6: Reduced maintenance thanks to quality materials
agricole.dlDesc: Download our complete documentation on our agricultural solutions
agricole.ctaDesc: Our experts study your project and support you from A to Z
agricole.miniFaq1Q: What is the construction time for a steel agricultural building?
agricole.miniFaq1A: The average lead time is 10 to 20 weeks: 2-4 weeks for studies, 6-10 weeks for factory manufacturing and 2-6 weeks for on-site assembly. A detailed schedule is provided upon order.
agricole.miniFaq2Q: What types of agricultural buildings do you build?
agricole.miniFaq2A: METALR builds free-stall and tie-stall barns, storage sheds (grain, fodder, equipment), livestock buildings (cattle, poultry, pigs) and AgriPV structures combining agriculture and solar energy production.
agricole.miniFaq3Q: Are your agricultural buildings compatible with solar panels?
agricole.miniFaq3A: Yes. Our structures are sized to support rooftop photovoltaic panels. We also offer dedicated AgriPV solutions that combine agricultural production and solar energy, with full support (ENEDIS grid connection, EDF OA contract).

industriel.heroSubtitle: Production halls, logistics warehouses and factory extensions. Turnkey steel constructions, EN 1090 certified.
industriel.solutionsTitle: Industrial halls, logistics warehouses and production buildings
industriel.solutionsSubtitle: From design to delivery, each building is sized according to your operational, flow and regulatory constraints.
industriel.sol1Desc: Turnkey production halls, factories and workshops. Large spans without intermediate columns for maximum layout flexibility.
industriel.sol2Desc: Logistics platforms, storage centers and cold storage. Optimized for vehicle circulation and loading.
industriel.sol3Desc: Modernization of existing buildings, surface extensions and compliance upgrades. Possible intervention on occupied sites.
industriel.sol4Desc: Custom interior structures to double your usable space without relocating. Load calculations adapted to your activity.
industriel.sol5Desc: Offices, showrooms and retail premises with steel frames. Fast assembly and architectural freedom.
industriel.sol6Desc: Walkways, canopies, technical covers and special works. Every project is unique, every solution is designed for you.
industriel.advantagesTitle: Why choose METALR for your industrial project
industriel.advantagesSubtitle: A complete approach that guarantees the success of your project, from study to commissioning.
industriel.adv1Desc: Our engineers design your structure with the most advanced software (Tekla, Robot) for optimized results.
industriel.adv2Desc: 8 production plants in Europe and Africa. Full control of the chain, from cutting to galvanization.
industriel.adv3Desc: Our qualified assembly teams operate throughout France and internationally.
industriel.adv4Desc: Detailed planning from order. 98% of our projects are delivered on time.
industriel.adv5Desc: EN 1090 EXC3, ISO 9001, CE marking. Every piece is traced and controlled.
industriel.adv6Desc: A single contact from first meeting to after-sales. Building permits, thermal studies, coordination included.
industriel.processSubtitle: A proven 6-step process to turn your needs into a delivered building.
industriel.proc1Desc: Analysis of the site, constraints and your functional needs.
industriel.proc2Desc: 3D plans, structural calculations and cost optimization.
industriel.proc3Desc: Factory production with quality control at every stage.
industriel.proc4Desc: Organized transport and planned site logistics.
industriel.proc5Desc: On-site assembly by our specialized teams.
industriel.proc6Desc: Final inspections, acceptance report and key handover.
industriel.ctaDesc: Let's discuss your industrial construction or renovation project
industriel.miniFaq1Q: What is the maximum span of an industrial building without intermediate columns?
industriel.miniFaq1A: Our steel frames allow clear spans of up to 50 meters without intermediate columns, offering maximum layout flexibility for your production halls and warehouses.
industriel.miniFaq2Q: Can an existing industrial building be extended with a steel extension?
industriel.miniFaq2A: Yes, METALR specializes in extensions and height increases of existing buildings. We work on occupied sites with a phasing plan that minimizes disruption to your operations.
industriel.miniFaq3Q: What certifications guarantee the quality of your industrial buildings?
industriel.miniFaq3A: All our structures are EN 1090 certified (EXC2/EXC3 classes), ISO 9001 certified, and bear the CE marking. Every piece is traced from raw material to assembly, with a quality control report provided upon delivery.

ouvragesArt.heroTitle: Steel structures for civil engineering: footbridges, bridges and infrastructure
ouvragesArt.heroSubtitle: Exceptional metal structures for the most demanding projects: bridges, footbridges, complex frameworks and civil engineering infrastructure.
ouvragesArt.typologiesSubtitle: Recognized expertise in the most technical metal structures, in France and internationally.
ouvragesArt.typ1Desc: Design and construction of urban footbridges, railway crossings and lightweight structures. Contemporary design and careful landscape integration.
ouvragesArt.typ2Desc: Road bridge decks, rail bridges and crossing structures. Bolted or welded assembly depending on site constraints.
ouvragesArt.typ3Desc: Large-span structures for public facilities, stations, airports and landmark buildings. Curved geometries and custom assemblies.
ouvragesArt.typ4Desc: Signage supports, highway gantries, masts and pylons. Resistance to dynamic loads and extreme weather conditions.
ouvragesArt.typ5Desc: Monumental staircases, architectural railings and safety features for public structures. Quality finishes and accessibility compliance.
ouvragesArt.typ6Desc: Diagnosis, reinforcement and restoration of existing metal structures. Life extension and seismic compliance upgrades.
ouvragesArt.expertiseSubtitle: Our structural engineers master the most complex calculations to ensure the safety and durability of every structure.
ouvragesArt.exp1Desc: 3D finite element modeling, non-linear analysis and limit state verification according to Eurocodes.
ouvragesArt.exp2Desc: Seismic calculations, fatigue studies and vibration analysis for structures subject to dynamic loads.
ouvragesArt.exp3Desc: Steel grade selection, optimized sizing and self-weight reduction for efficient and cost-effective structures.
ouvragesArt.exp4Desc: Full compliance with European standards EN 1993, EN 1090 and specific national regulations.
ouvragesArt.exp5Desc: A dedicated engineer from launch to handover. Coordination with earthworks, civil engineering and utilities contractors.
ouvragesArt.exp6Desc: Control procedures at every stage: welding, geometry, assembly. EN 1090 EXC3 certification for the most demanding structures.
ouvragesArt.chiffresTitle: METALR in numbers for civil engineering
ouvragesArt.ctaDesc: Our engineers are at your disposal to study the feasibility of your project
ouvragesArt.miniFaq1Q: What execution class for steel civil engineering structures?
ouvragesArt.miniFaq1A: METALR is EN 1090 certified up to execution class EXC3, which covers the vast majority of civil engineering structures: footbridges, road bridges, signage structures. EXC3 class guarantees an enhanced level of control at every manufacturing stage.
ouvragesArt.miniFaq2Q: Do you carry out seismic studies for civil engineering structures?
ouvragesArt.miniFaq2A: Yes, our design office integrates seismic calculations according to Eurocode 8, fatigue studies and vibration analysis for structures subject to dynamic loads (traffic, wind, earthquake).
ouvragesArt.miniFaq3Q: Can you rehabilitate an existing steel structure?
ouvragesArt.miniFaq3A: Yes, we carry out diagnosis, reinforcement and restoration of existing steel structures. This includes seismic compliance upgrades, replacement of corroded elements and extending the structure's lifespan.

stabulation.title: 180-Cow Free-Stall Barn
stabulation.projectDesc: Design and construction of a free-stall barn for 180 dairy cows in Normandy. This 1,200 m² livestock building features a high-performance steel frame, optimized natural ventilation, and modern equipment to ensure animal welfare and farm productivity.
stabulation.c1: Designing a structure suited for 180 cows with optimal circulation space
stabulation.c2: Effective natural ventilation for animal comfort in all seasons
stabulation.c3: Integration of automated milking and feeding systems
stabulation.c4: Compliance with environmental and animal welfare standards
stabulation.s1: Modular steel frame with 30-meter clear spans
stabulation.s2: Open-slat cladding and ridge ventilation for natural airflow
stabulation.s3: Concrete slabs with integrated channels and comfort cubicles
stabulation.s4: Insulated roof with translucent panels for natural lighting

footer.description: Designing and building tomorrow's energy with innovation and sustainability.

faq.heroSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our steel construction solutions and services.

general.title: The company
general.q1: Who is METALR and what are your areas of activity?
general.a1: METALR is a steel structure manufacturer based in Europe and Africa. We design, manufacture and install agricultural buildings, solar canopies and photovoltaic plants, industrial buildings and civil engineering structures. Our 8 production sites have an annual capacity of 12,000 tonnes.
general.q2: In which countries do you operate?
general.a2: We are based in France (group headquarters), Guinea (Conakry), Romania, Ivory Coast, Thailand, UAE, Kosovo and Tunisia. We operate throughout France, Europe, Africa and Asia.
general.a3: We are EN 1090 certified (EXC2 and EXC3 classes), ISO 9001 for quality management, and hold CE marking. Every piece is traceable from manufacturing to assembly. We also hold a ten-year structural warranty.
general.q4: How many projects have you completed?
general.a4: We have delivered over 1,200 projects across our areas of expertise: agricultural buildings, photovoltaic installations, industrial constructions and civil engineering structures.

solutions.title: Our solutions
solutions.q1: What types of agricultural buildings do you offer?
solutions.a1: We build free-stall and tie-stall barns, storage buildings (fodder, equipment, grain), poultry houses, equestrian arenas and agricultural greenhouses. Each structure is custom-designed to meet the farm's specific needs.
solutions.a2: We offer parking canopies (compliant with the Climate & Resilience law for parking areas over 1,500 m²), ground-mounted plants from 1 to 50 MWp, rooftop photovoltaic systems in overlay or substitution, and single or dual-axis solar trackers with a 20-35% yield improvement.
solutions.a3: Yes, every project is unique. Our engineering office designs structures tailored to your technical, regulatory and budgetary constraints. We use Tekla Structures and Robot Structural Analysis to optimise each project.
solutions.q4: Can you renovate or extend an existing building?
solutions.a4: Absolutely. We carry out extensions, height increases and upgrades to bring existing buildings up to standard. We can work on occupied sites with phasing solutions to minimise the impact on your operations.

technique.title: Technical aspects
technique.q1: What does a typical project with METALR look like?
technique.a1: The process follows 6 steps: feasibility study (site, constraints, budget), custom design (3D plans, structural calculations), certified factory production (laser cutting, welding, galvanisation), logistics delivery, on-site assembly by our specialised teams, and handover with final inspections and DOE documentation.
technique.q2: What materials and surface treatments do you use?
technique.a2: We primarily work with structural steels (S235, S355, S460) selected according to each project's constraints. Surface treatments include hot-dip galvanisation (ISO 1461 standard), thermal spray metallisation and anti-corrosion paint according to corrosivity classes C1 to C5.
technique.q3: How do you guarantee the quality of your structures?
technique.a3: Every manufacturing stage undergoes checks: dimensional after cutting, visual and dye penetrant testing after welding, verification of bolted assemblies during installation. Welders are qualified to EN ISO 9606. A complete inspection report is provided upon delivery of each structure.

commercial.title: Project & support
commercial.a1: Lead times vary depending on project complexity. On average: 2 to 4 weeks for the study, 6 to 12 weeks for manufacturing, and 2 to 6 weeks for assembly. 98% of our projects are delivered on time. A detailed schedule is provided upon order.
commercial.a2: Yes, we handle administrative procedures: building permits, prior declarations, ENEDIS connection for photovoltaic projects, EDF OA contracts, RT2020 thermal studies and coordination with inspection bodies.
commercial.q3: How can I get a quote?
commercial.a3: Contact us via our online form or by email at contact@metalr.fr. A project manager will get back to you within 48 hours for an initial needs analysis. The feasibility study and preliminary costing are free and without obligation.
commercial.q4: Do you provide maintenance after delivery?
commercial.a4: Yes, we offer preventive and corrective maintenance contracts tailored to each type of structure. For photovoltaic installations, we provide remote production monitoring and rapid intervention in case of anomalies.

faq.ctaDesc: Our team is available to answer all your questions

privacyPage.seoDesc: METALR privacy policy — personal data processing, cookies and user rights (GDPR).
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1c1: The data controller for personal data collected on the website www.metalr.fr is:
privacyPage.s1c2: METALR — 14 Rue Bernard Barot, ZAC Littes, 63111 Mur-sur-Allier, France
privacyPage.s2c1: In the context of using the website, METALR may collect the following categories of data:
privacyPage.s2c2: • Identification data: surname, first name, email address, phone number, company name.
privacyPage.s2c3: • Connection data: IP address, browser type, pages viewed, date and time of connection.
privacyPage.s2c4: • Request-related data: subject of the request, message, documents possibly transmitted via the contact form.
privacyPage.s3c1: Personal data collected is processed for the following purposes:
privacyPage.s3c2: • Responding to contact and quote requests submitted via the online form.
privacyPage.s3c3: • Managing customer relations and commercial follow-up.
privacyPage.s3c4: • Improving website navigation and user experience.
privacyPage.s3c6: • Sending commercial communications (newsletters, news), subject to the user's prior consent.
privacyPage.s4c1: Personal data processing is based on the following legal grounds:
privacyPage.s4c3: • METALR's legitimate interest (website improvement, traffic statistics).
privacyPage.s5c1: Personal data is retained for a period proportionate to the purpose for which it was collected:
privacyPage.s5c2: • Contact data and quote requests: 3 years from last contact.
privacyPage.s5c4: • Newsletter data: until consent is withdrawn.
privacyPage.s6c1: Collected data is intended for METALR's internal departments (commercial, management). It may be transmitted to the following subcontractors as part of their services:
privacyPage.s6c2: • Otika.fr — web agency, for website maintenance and technical development.
privacyPage.s6c4: METALR ensures that its subcontractors provide sufficient guarantees regarding the protection of personal data. No data is sold to third parties.
privacyPage.s7c1: Website hosting by Vercel may involve data transfers to the United States. This transfer is governed by standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission, in accordance with Article 46 of the GDPR.
privacyPage.s8c1: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights:
privacyPage.s8c2: • Right of access: obtain confirmation that your data is being processed and receive a copy.
privacyPage.s8c3: • Right of rectification: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacyPage.s8c4: • Right to erasure: request deletion of your data in cases provided by regulations.
privacyPage.s8c5: • Right to restriction of processing: request suspension of the processing of your data.
privacyPage.s8c6: • Right to data portability: receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacyPage.s8c7: • Right to object: object to the processing of your data on legitimate grounds.
privacyPage.s8c8: • Right to withdraw consent: withdraw your consent at any time.
privacyPage.s8c9: To exercise your rights, send your request to: contact@metalr.fr
privacyPage.s8c10: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French National Commission for Data Protection): www.cnil.fr
privacyPage.s9c1: The website www.metalr.fr uses cookies to improve the browsing experience and compile traffic statistics.
privacyPage.s9c2: • Strictly necessary cookies: ensure the proper functioning of the website (session, language preferences). They do not require consent.
privacyPage.s9c3: • Analytical cookies: measure website audience (number of visits, most visited pages). Only placed with your consent.
privacyPage.s9c4: You can change your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings or the consent banner displayed on your first visit.
privacyPage.s10c1: METALR implements appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration or disclosure.
privacyPage.s10c2: The website uses the HTTPS protocol to secure data exchanges between your browser and our servers.
privacyPage.s11c1: METALR reserves the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on the website. We encourage you to consult this page regularly.

cookiesPage.seoDesc: METALR cookie policy — information about cookies used, their management and your rights.
cookiesPage.title: Cookie Policy
cookiesPage.s1c1: A cookie is a small text file placed on your device (computer, tablet, smartphone) when visiting a website. It allows the website to store information about your browsing (language preferences, session identifier, etc.).
cookiesPage.s2c1: The website www.metalr.fr exclusively uses cookies strictly necessary for the proper functioning of the site:
cookiesPage.s2c2: • Consent cookie: records your choice regarding acceptance or refusal of cookies. Duration: 12 months.
cookiesPage.s2c3: • Language preference cookie: stores the chosen display language. Duration: 12 months.
cookiesPage.s2c4: • Session cookie: ensures proper website navigation. Duration: session (deleted when the browser is closed).
cookiesPage.s2c5: No analytical, advertising or tracking cookies are currently placed on this website.
cookiesPage.s3c1: Strictly necessary cookies do not require your consent in accordance with Article 82 of the French Data Protection Act and CNIL guidelines.
cookiesPage.s3c2: If non-essential cookies were to be added in the future (analytical cookies, performance cookies), your prior consent will be obtained via the consent banner displayed on the website.
cookiesPage.s4c1: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time:
cookiesPage.s4c2: • Via the consent banner displayed on your first visit to the website.
cookiesPage.s4c4: – Google Chrome: Settings > Privacy and Security > Cookies
cookiesPage.s4c5: – Mozilla Firefox: Settings > Privacy and Security > Cookies
cookiesPage.s4c7: – Microsoft Edge: Settings > Cookies and Site Permissions
cookiesPage.s4c8: Deleting or blocking certain cookies may affect the proper functioning of the website.
cookiesPage.s5c1: Strictly necessary cookies are retained for a maximum of 12 months. The session cookie is automatically deleted when your browser is closed.
cookiesPage.s6c1: In accordance with the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act, you have the right to access, rectify, erase and object to the processing of your personal data.
cookiesPage.s6c3: You can also lodge a complaint with the CNIL: www.cnil.fr
cookiesPage.s7c1: METALR reserves the right to modify this cookie policy at any time. Changes take effect upon publication on this page.
